final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire read_enable,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);

    reg [15:0] cell_data;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            cell_data <= 16'b0; // Reset cell_data
            data_out <= 16'b0; // Reset output
        end else begin
            if (write_enable) begin
                cell_data <= data_in; // Write input data to cell_data
            end
            if (read_enable) begin
                data_out <= cell_data; // Read cell_data to output
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
